criteria.name: correct_file
criteria.description: Identifies the correct file where sanitize_fts_query is defined (src/store/fts.rs).

criteria.name: sanitization_logic
criteria.description: Explains how the query is sanitized by filtering out FTS5 operator characters (*, ^, ", (, ), :, ;, -, +) and wrapping each word/token in double quotes.
criteria.groundTruth: Strips characters (*, ^, ", (, ), :, ;, -, +) and quotes remaining tokens/words.

criteria.name: empty_query_handling
criteria.description: Explains that if the entire query consists of special characters, sanitize_fts_query returns an empty string, and search_sparse handles this by returning an empty vector immediately.
criteria.groundTruth: It returns an empty string, and search_sparse returns an empty vector immediately to avoid executing an FTS5 MATCH on an empty string.
